nasb.text: Do not receive an accusation against an elder except on the basis of two or three witnesses.

esv.text: Do not admit a charge against an elder except on the evidence of two or three witnesses.

cnv.text: 控訴長老的事，除非有兩三個證人，否則不要受理。

ccb.text: 若有人向你控告长老，必须有两三个证人，否则不要受理。

csbs.text: 除非有两三个见证人，否则你不可受理对长老的控告。
